name: First State Bank
description_short: Belmond, IA's First State Bank at 304 E Main St offers local banking services and financial products to residents in the Belmond community.
description_long:
First State Bank in Belmond, IA operates a branch at 304 E Main St, centrally located in Belmond's downtown district. This standalone facility serves the Belmond community with convenient access for residents and local businesses. The branch is easily accessible from the main commercial area and provides a professional banking environment.

At the Belmond branch, First State Bank offers a full range of banking services including checking accounts, savings accounts, personal loans, and mortgage services. Customers can speak with experienced bankers about their financial needs and explore products tailored to Belmond residents. The location at 304 E Main St is staffed with professionals who understand local banking requirements.

For Belmond, IA residents, having a full-service bank in town means convenient access to financial services without traveling to larger communities. When visiting the branch, bring your ID and relevant financial documents. First State Bank brings personalized banking solutions directly to Belmond.
services: Online banking platform with username enrollment
Business loans for inventory and building
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government guarantee
Specialized agriculture financing tailored to farming operations
Mobile banking app for account access on-the-go
Online banking with account enrollment available
Value Checking account option for personal use
Business loans available for inventory and building purchases
Established community bank with routing number on file
cons: Website provides no information on interest rates, APYs, or loan terms
No details on fees, minimum balances, or account requirements
Limited geographic reach as a small community bank may restrict access
No information about customer service hours or phone support
Minimal product comparison data to evaluate competitiveness
best_for: Iowa residents and rural customers needing agriculture financing
Small business owners in the Belmond area seeking local lending relationships
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance and traditional banking security
Agricultural operators requiring specialized farm financing
diagnosis: First State Bank is best for customers in rural Iowa seeking traditional community banking with FDIC protection and agricultural financing options. The primary caveat is the lack of published rate, fee, and term information online, requiring direct contact with the bank for pricing and competitive comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
